case_title: MARK SOLE VS. CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-11-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. SONNY KOYA APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DOANLD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
